overall.description: First-person perspective walking through a dark forest trail at night in a video game environment. The camera moves steadily along a narrow dirt path surrounded by dense vegetation and rock formations with limited visibility due to darkness.

segments.scene_description: The trail continues through the forest with a large tree trunk now prominent on the left. Scattered rocks appear along the right side of the path as the dense vegetation recedes slightly into the mid-ground.

segments.scene_description: The path winds past massive boulder formations on the left side. Large rocks line both sides of the trail as the camera continues deeper into the dark forest with the path narrowing ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement along a narrow dirt trail that transitions from a dense, overgrown forest into a rugged corridor of massive rock formations. It begins by pushing through thick undergrowth and bushes that crowd the path, limiting visibility into the dark woods ahead. As the camera advances, the vegetation recedes slightly into the mid-ground, making way for a prominent tree trunk on the left and scattered rocks appearing along the right. The scene then shifts as the trail winds past towering boulder formations on the left, with large rocks increasingly lining both sides of the path. Finally, the camera continues deeper into the darkness as the trail narrows further between the imposing stone walls.
